notes:
1. 扫描游戏和游戏列表页面新增实时搜索，支持按名称或 AppID 过滤
2. 自动解析 Steam appinfo.vdf，无需联网即可定位存档路径
3. 通过 Windows 注册表发现额外的游戏安装路径，提升存档识别率
4. 增强
5. 支持罗马数字转换（III→3）、首字母缩写匹配（Grand Theft Auto→GTA）、噪音词过滤
6. 新增 UE/Unity/RPG Maker 等引擎的存档目录识别模式
7. 目录遍历跳过列表扩展至 30+，自动跳过 shader、video、node_modules 等无关目录
8. AutoCloud 扫描深度优化，模糊搜索增加早期退出机制
9. 修复搜索过滤后全部添加”仍会添加未显示结果的问题
10. 优化 SteamDB 与本地识别的切换逻辑
11. ---
12. Added real-time search to game scanning and game list pages, supporting filtering by name or AppID
13. Automatic parsing of Steam appinfo.vdf, enabling save path localization without internet connection
14. Discover additional game installation paths through Windows Registry, improving save file recognition rate
15. Support for Roman numeral conversion (III→3), acronym matching (Grand Theft Auto→GTA), and noise word filtering
16. Added save directory recognition patterns for engines such as UE/Unity/RPG Maker
17. Directory traversal skip list expanded to 30+ entries, automatically skipping irrelevant directories like shader, video, node_modules, etc.
18. AutoCloud scan depth optimization, fuzzy search now includes early exit mechanism
19. Fixed issue where \Add All" would still add non-displayed results after search filtering
20. Optimized switching logic between SteamDB and local recognition
